topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules for automating the Ecobee thermostat based on presence detection, location changes, and specific triggers from SmartThings, optimizing heating and cooling settings to enhance energy efficiency.

rows.if_then_rule: IF Indoor temperature less than from ecobee THEN Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee.
IF Indoor humidity greater than from ecobee THEN Set hold for X hours using ecobee.
IF Outdoor temperature less than from ecobee THEN Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee.

IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN Set hold for X hours using ecobee.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN Set hold until next transition using ecobee.
IF Switched on from SmartThings THEN Set comfort profile for X hours using ecobee.
IF Sensor activated from SkylinkNet THEN Set comfort profile until next transition using ecobee.
IF Every day of the week at from Date & Time THEN Set hold for X hours using ecobee.
